summary: Record the bounded aggregate verification after the MCP stdio lifecycle controller: 171 files and 1266 tests pass.

decisions.decision: Run one aggregate suite after the stdio controller crossed framing, dispatch, and lifecycle seams; stop while green.
decisions.rationale: The controller's focused tests, lint, and build were green; this single aggregate run falsifies regressions without a repeated test loop.

testEvidence.criterion: Existing application behavior remains green after the MCP lifecycle controller addition.
testEvidence.test: Run the complete Vitest suite once after the controller commit.

red.outcome: No red run was required; focused controller/handler, lint, and build gates were green before this bounded aggregate.

green.outcome: GREEN: 171 test files passed and 1266 tests passed in 19.40s.

questions: The actual desktop child process, settings toggle, process inspection proof, and hosted AC-11.c evidence remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
